title: Light Oak Concealed Fixing 20Mm Door Brush Strip - 914Mm - 36" Inches Long
features: Light Oak Concealed Fixing 20mm Door Brush Strip - 914mm - 36" Inches Long
The Exitex concealed fixing brush strip in a light oak effect finish provides a neat unobtrusive appearance and reduces draughts and the transmission of sound.

This hidden fixing draught excluding brush strip features 20mm long hard wearing resilient bristles mounted in a 22mm PVC carrier with a special snap fit cover, easy and quick to install with the minimum of fuss, and will immediately help to reduce your heating bill and provide a more comfortable environment.
